title: What You Need to Play
content:
To play Moonstone, in addition to these rules you will need:
• 2–4 players
• A 3’ by 3’ playing surface with fantasy terrain
• 3–6 **Moonstone Miniatures** for each player, with accompanying **Character Cards**.
• A tape measure or precision measuring instrument(s)
• A 21-card **Arcane Deck**
• An 18-card **Melee Deck**
• A pile of small blue disks to use as **Energy Tokens**
• 7x four-sided dice to act as **Moonstones**
• 1x six-sided die for each player
